Following Instructions at School.name: Classroom How-To Guide
Following Instructions at School.overview: Students create a step-by-step written guide for a classroom task (e.g., organizing supplies, setting up for an activity), using imperatives and sequencing words like 'first, next, and then'.
Following Instructions at School.general_objective: Develop procedural writing skills and clear instruction giving.
Following Instructions at School.technology_integration: Use video recording and editing tools for instructional videos and digital tools for flowchart creation.

Following Instructions at School.name: Instructional Video
Following Instructions at School.overview: Students record a video demonstrating a classroom routine, such as cleaning up or preparing for a project, using imperatives and collaborative language like 'let's' and 'we'.
Following Instructions at School.general_objective: Develop media production skills and collaborative language use.
Following Instructions at School.technology_integration: Use video recording and editing tools for production.

Following Instructions at School.name: Task Flowchart
Following Instructions at School.overview: Students design a flowchart outlining steps in completing a task (e.g., art project or science experiment) with sequencing words and imperatives.
Following Instructions at School.general_objective: Develop visual planning and organizational skills.
Following Instructions at School.technology_integration: Use digital tools for flowchart creation and presentation.

Helping in the Garden.name: Garden Growth Chart
Helping in the Garden.overview: Students describe plant growth using 'this/that' and verbs such as 'dig,' 'plant,' 'water,' 'grow.'
Helping in the Garden.general_objective: Develop observation skills and gardening vocabulary.
Helping in the Garden.technology_integration: Use plant growth tracking apps and video recording for tutorials.

Helping in the Garden.name: Step-by-Step Planting Guide
Helping in the Garden.overview: Students create a planting guide with simple gardening steps.
Helping in the Garden.general_objective: Develop instructional design and sequential thinking.
Helping in the Garden.technology_integration: Create digital planting guides with images.

Helping in the Garden.name: Gardening Video Tutorial
Helping in the Garden.overview: Students film a simple video tutorial on planting seeds, describing the process step by step.
Helping in the Garden.general_objective: Develop video production and explanatory skills.
Helping in the Garden.technology_integration: Use video recording apps and editing tools.

A Trip to the Beach.name: Packing Checklist
A Trip to the Beach.overview: Students create a checklist for a trip, using prepositions of movement ('to the beach') and routines ('I always...').
A Trip to the Beach.general_objective: Develop planning skills and routine vocabulary.
A Trip to the Beach.technology_integration: Use digital checklist and storyboarding tools.

A Trip to the Beach.name: Trip Storyboard
A Trip to the Beach.overview: Students create a storyboard of their trip to the beach using 'going to' (e.g., 'We are going to the beach early in the morning.').
A Trip to the Beach.general_objective: Develop storytelling and future planning skills.

A Trip to the Beach.name: Digital Beach Adventure
A Trip to the Beach.overview: Students create a storyboard about a trip to the beach, incorporating digital pictures as illustrations and describing activities and routines.
A Trip to the Beach.general_objective: Develop digital storytelling and media integration skills.
A Trip to the Beach.technology_integration: Create digital stories with images and text.

The Beautiful Mola.name: Mola Design Project
The Beautiful Mola.overview: Students design a mola, describing the steps and choosing the colors (e.g., 'First, I choose the red fabric. Then I cut it.').
The Beautiful Mola.general_objective: Develop artistic design and sequential description skills.
The Beautiful Mola.technology_integration: Use video editing apps for tutorials and virtual exhibit tools.

The Beautiful Mola.name: Virtual Mola Exhibit
The Beautiful Mola.overview: Students create a virtual exhibit of their mola designs, describing the process using sequencing words.
The Beautiful Mola.general_objective: Develop digital exhibition and descriptive skills.

The Beautiful Mola.name: Mola Design Video
The Beautiful Mola.overview: Students film a video tutorial showing how to create a mola, describing each step of the process.
The Beautiful Mola.general_objective: Develop video tutorial creation and explanatory skills.
The Beautiful Mola.technology_integration: Use video editing apps for tutorial production.

Morning, Noon, and Night.name: Classroom Clean-Up Plan
Morning, Noon, and Night.overview: Students develop a written plan outlining roles and responsibilities for keeping the classroom clean, using imperatives and present continuous tense.
Morning, Noon, and Night.general_objective: Develop responsibility planning and classroom management skills.
Morning, Noon, and Night.technology_integration: Use digital design tools for posters and charts.

Morning, Noon, and Night.name: Cleaning Instruction Poster
Morning, Noon, and Night.overview: Students design posters with illustrated instructions for cleaning tasks, using imperatives and collaborative language.
Morning, Noon, and Night.general_objective: Develop visual instruction design and collaborative language use.
Morning, Noon, and Night.technology_integration: Create digital posters with design software.

Morning, Noon, and Night.name: Classroom Responsibility Chart
Morning, Noon, and Night.overview: Students create a responsibility chart on paper or digitally, assigning weekly tasks to classmates, using present continuous and imperatives.
Morning, Noon, and Night.general_objective: Develop system design and responsibility tracking skills.
specific_objectives: Use present continuous for ongoing tasks

Our Weather Report.name: Weather Report Role-Play
Our Weather Report.overview: Students act out a weather report and describe what they need and wear (e.g., 'I need an umbrella.').
Our Weather Report.general_objective: Develop weather reporting and need/wear vocabulary skills.
Our Weather Report.technology_integration: Use digital weather maps and journaling apps.

Our Weather Report.name: Rainy Day Journal
Our Weather Report.overview: Students describe the activities they do during rainy days (e.g., 'It's raining today. I am reading inside the house.').
Our Weather Report.general_objective: Develop descriptive writing and weather-activity connection skills.

Our Weather Report.name: Digital Weather Map
Our Weather Report.overview: Students create or use a digital weather map, labeling locations and describing rainy weather.
Our Weather Report.general_objective: Develop digital mapping and weather description skills.

Planning Meals for My Family.name: Healthy Meal Plan
Planning Meals for My Family.overview: Students create a meal plan for their family, using countable and uncountable nouns with quantifiers and modal verbs to describe preparation.
Planning Meals for My Family.general_objective: Develop meal planning and food vocabulary skills.
Planning Meals for My Family.technology_integration: Use digital tools for recipe book creation and poster design.

Planning Meals for My Family.name: Digital Recipe Book
Planning Meals for My Family.overview: Students collaborate to create a digital recipe book featuring healthy meals. They describe the ingredients and steps using the present simple tense.
Planning Meals for My Family.general_objective: Develop collaborative digital publishing and recipe writing skills.

Planning Meals for My Family.name: Nutrition Poster
Planning Meals for My Family.overview: Students design a nutrition poster highlighting the benefits of different foods, using quantifiers and the present simple tense.
Planning Meals for My Family.general_objective: Develop nutrition education and persuasive design skills.
